Hero.name: Kyrylo Hasan
Hero.description: I specialize in building high-performance web interfaces using React, Next.js, and Tailwind CSS. My focus is on writing pixel-perfect, clean code and ensuring seamless mobile responsiveness for every project I bring to life.

About.title: About Me
About.subtitle: Building digital products with a focus on code quality and performance
About.description1: I am a passionate Front-End Developer dedicated to crafting clean, efficient, and user-centric web applications. My approach combines technical precision with a keen eye for design, ensuring that every project is not only functional but also visually engaging.
About.description2: I specialize in the React ecosystem, leveraging Next.js and Tailwind CSS to build scalable solutions. I am constantly exploring new technologies to stay at the forefront of the industry and deliver modern web experiences that meet the highest standards.

cleanCode.title: Clean Code
cleanCode.description: Writing maintainable, readable, and efficient code.

responsive.title: Responsive Design
responsive.description: Ensuring seamless experience across all devices.

Skills.title: Skills & Technologies
Skills.description: Here are the modern frameworks, tools, and practices I leverage to bring digital ideas to life.

Projects.title: My Projects
Projects.sectionDescription: Here are some of my recent projects that showcase my skills and passion for web development.

niceGadgets.title: Nice Gadgets
niceGadgets.description: A responsive and user-friendly product catalog showcasing various phone models. Users can browse, filter by brand and price, view detailed pages for each phone.

natureGuardians.title: Nature Guardians
natureGuardians.description: A responsive and user-friendly website for a nonprofit environmental organization. Users can learn about the mission, explore projects, and make donations.

creativeBakery.title: Creative Bakery
creativeBakery.description: A clean and modern landing page for a fictional bakery brand. The design emphasizes soft colors and elegant typography.

bangOlufsen.title: Bang & Olufsen
bangOlufsen.description: A sleek and modern landing page inspired by Bang & Olufsen, showcasing elegant interior design elements.

game2048.title: 2048 Game
game2048.description: A browser-based version of the classic 2048 game featuring keyboard controls, score tracking and smooth animations.

Contacts.title: Get In Touch
Contacts.description: I'm always interested in new opportunities and interesting projects. Let's discuss how we can work together!

success.title: Success!
success.message: Your message has been sent successfully.

info.title: Let's connect
info.description: I'm currently available for freelance work and full-time opportunities. Whether you have a project in mind or just want to chat about technology, I'd love to hear from you.

Contacts.footer: © 2026 Kyrylo Hasan. Designed & Built with ❤️ using Next.js and Tailwind CSS.
